scenario.name: VOS-RS carrier inbound DID UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]carrier[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:carrier@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=carrier 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS carrier inbound DID c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]carrier[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]carrier[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Content-Length: 0
